records.question: What accounts with the name 725 have financial transactions where the transaction type is Refund?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT accounts.account_id FROM accounts
JOIN financial_transactions ON accounts.account_id = financial_transactions.account_id
WHERE financial_transactions.transaction_type = 'Refund' AND accounts.account_name = '725'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Accounts.account_id
FROM Accounts
JOIN Financial_Transactions ON Accounts.account_id = Financial_Transactions.account_id
WHERE Accounts.account_name = '725' AND Financial_Transactions.transaction_type = 'Refund'

records.question: Which accounts named 162 with other details as VIP have refunds of at least 1931.76 on 2018-03-24 12:08:55 using cards exactly 4539333582760 valid from at most 2012-05-22 02:05:41 and valid to at least 2018-02-25 15:43:32?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT accounts.account_id FROM accounts
JOIN financial_transactions ON accounts.account_id = financial_transactions.account_id
JOIN customers_cards ON financial_transactions.card_id = customers_cards.card_id
WHERE customers_cards.other_card_details = '4539333582760' AND accounts.account_name = '162' AND financial_transactions.transaction_type = 'Refund' AND financial_transactions.transaction_date = '2018-03-24 12:08:55' AND customers_cards.date_valid_to >= '2018-02-25 15:43:32' AND financial_transactions.transaction_amount >= 1931.76 AND accounts.other_account_details = 'VIP' AND customers_cards.date_valid_from <= '2012-05-22 02:05:41'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Accounts.account_id
FROM Accounts
JOIN Financial_Transactions ON Accounts.account_id = Financial_Transactions.account_id
JOIN Customers_Cards ON Financial_Transactions.card_id = Customers_Cards.card_id
WHERE Accounts.account_name = '162'
  AND Accounts.other_account_details = 'VIP'
  AND Financial_Transactions.transaction_type = 'refund'
  AND Financial_Transactions.transaction_amount >= 1931.76
  AND Financial_Transactions.transaction_date = '2018-03-24 12:08:55'
  AND Customers_Cards.card_number = '4539333582760'
  AND Customers_Cards.date_valid_from <= '2012-05-22 02:05:41'
  AND Customers_Cards.date_valid_to >= '2018-02-25 15:43:32'
